ddls:
CREATE TABLE "administrative_areas" (
  "area_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each administrative area */,
  "id_openzh_git" TEXT /* Identifier used in the OpenZH Git repository */,
  "administrative_area_level" INTEGER /* Level of the administrative area (1, 2, 3) */,
  "administrative_area_level_2" TEXT /* Name of the administrative area at level 2 */,
  "administrative_area_level_3" TEXT /* Name of the administrative area at level 3 (if applicable) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the administrative area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the administrative area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the administrative area */,
  "key_alpha_2" TEXT /* Alpha-2 code for the administrative area */,
  "key_google_mobility" TEXT /* Key used in Google Mobility data */,
  "key_apple_mobility" TEXT /* Key used in Apple Mobility data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility_data" (
  "mobility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobility data entry */,
  "area_id" TEXT /* ID of the administrative area the data is associated with */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the mobility data (e.g., Google, Apple) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the mobility data */,
  "mobility_index" REAL /* Mobility index value */,
  "mode_of_transportation" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., walking, driving, public transport) */,
  "trips_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of trips taken per day */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of trips */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mobility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES administrative_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "area_id" TEXT /* ID of the administrative area the data is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population value for the given year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES administrative_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is associated with */,
  "administrative_area_id" TEXT /* ID of the administrative area the permission is for */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_administrative_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("administrative_area_id") REFERENCES administrative_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility_data_sources" (
  "mobility_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobility data source entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "mobility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mobility data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mobility_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_sources_mobility_id FOREIGN KEY ("mobility_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("mobility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
